_comment: Copy this file to connections.json (git-ignored) and fill in real values. NEVER commit connections.json.

estock_source._role: READ-ONLY source to mirror during transition. ProCare NEVER writes here.
estock_source._note: Live eStock on Mshala machine (192.168.1.2), credentials are read-only

titan_drugeye_source._role: READ-ONLY clinical source: product names + drug substitution/interactions.
titan_drugeye_source._note: On Mshala at D:\Labirdo; schema discovery TBD

procare_database._role: ProCare OS OWN database — the new system of record. Read/write on ProCare Dev.
procare_database._note: Phase 2 pilot: Elsanta + Mshala branches run in parallel on ProCare Dev for 3 months. After validation, cutover to full ProCare ownership.

programs.estock_app_path: TBD_(confirm install path of eStock app)

mshala._note: 3-month parallel test: Phase 2 POS writes + employee mobile
